deviations.description: The new requirement obligates doctor approval for discharge of patients over 65 or with more than 5 medications, but the process model only includes nurse approval for patients over 65 and does not require any approval for patients with more than 5 medications. This results in a direct violation of the stricter Version 2 requirement.

The process model enforces nurse approval for discharge of patients over 65, but Version 2 requires doctor approval instead. Continuing to require nurse approval constitutes unnecessary enforcement of an outdated constraint.
Version 2 removes the 24-hour time constraint for approval, but the process model enforces this outdated temporal restriction. This results in unnecessary restriction of process behavior.
